parse.title: Golden Egg
parse.text:
Golden Egg
A very rare and special egg with a solid gold shell.
Information

The Golden Egg is an animal product obtained from Golden Chickens. They will produce a Golden Egg every day as long as they are fed.

To obtain Golden Eggs and Golden Chickens, Perfection must have been achieved. Progress can be tracked in Qi's Walnut Room.

After reaching Perfection, the first Golden Egg can be obtained in four ways:

  • Marnie's Ranch for data-sort-value="100000">100,000g.
  • Qi's Walnut Room for data-sort-value="100"> 100.
  • Random Event that occurs after the player goes to sleep. A golden witch will fly over a Coop and leave a Golden Egg inside.
  • Randomly from a Fishing Treasure Chest (0.12% chance).

Golden Eggs can be put into an incubator in a Big or Deluxe Coop to hatch a Golden Chicken 6 days later, or 3 days with the Coopmaster Profession.

Gifting[edit]

Dislike  Abigail •  Dwarf •  Haley •  Jas •  Pam •  Vincent •  Wizard
Hate  Sebastian

Bundles[edit]

Golden Egg is not used in any bundles.

Artisan Goods[edit]

See also: Animal Products Profitability

Golden Eggs can be used to make the following Artisan Goods. Note that golden eggs always produce three gold-quality Mayonnaise when processed, regardless of the input quality.

Image Name Description Ingredient Equipment Time Sell Price
Mayonnaise (3) It looks spreadable. Golden Egg (1)
Mayonnaise Machine 		3 Hours
285g

Tailoring[edit]

Golden Egg is not used in any tailoring or dyeing.

Quests[edit]

  • "Gus' Famous Omelet": On the Special Orders board in front of the Mayor's Manor, Gus may randomly request that the player collect and deliver 24 Eggs (of any type) to the fridge in the Stardrop Saloon. The reward is data-sort-value="3000">3,000g and a Mini-Fridge.
  • Five Eggs (any type, excluding Dinosaur) may be requested by the Raccoon at the Giant Stump as part of his third request, or as part of any request starting with the sixth.

History[edit]

  • 1.5: Introduced.
  • 1.6: Can be used for a Raccoon request.

They will produce a Golden Egg every day as long as they are fed. To obtain Golden Eggs and Golden Chickens, [[Perfection]] must have been achieved. Progress can be tracked in [[Qi's Walnut Room#Perfection Tracker|Qi's Walnut Room]]. After reaching Perfection, the first Golden Egg can be obtained in four ways: *[[Marnie's Ranch]] for {{Price|100000}}. *[[Qi's Walnut Room]] for {{Price|100|gem}}. *[[Random Events#The Witch|Random Event]] that occurs after the player goes to sleep. A golden witch will fly over a [[Coop]] and leave a Golden Egg inside. *Randomly from a [[Fishing#Treasure Chests|Fishing Treasure Chest]] (0.12% chance). Golden Eggs can be put into an [[incubator]] in a [[Carpenter's Shop#Farm Buildings|Big or Deluxe Coop]] to hatch a Golden Chicken 6 days later, or 3 days with the [[Farming#Farming Skill|Coopmaster Profession]]. ==Gifting== {{GiftsByItem |neutral=Robin,Maru,Caroline,George,Evelyn,Lewis,Clint,Penny,Emily,Elliott,Gus,Harvey,Sandy,Willy,Krobus,Leo |like=Demetrius,Linus,Pierre,Alex,Jodi,Kent,Sam,Leah,Shane,Marnie |hate=Sebastian |dislike=Abigail,Pam,Haley,Jas,Vincent,Dwarf,Wizard }} ==Bundles== Golden Egg is not used in any [[bundles]]. ==Artisan Goods== :''See also: [[Animal Products Profitability]]'' Golden Eggs can be used to make the following [[Artisan Goods]].
